description: Apply UI/UX excellence to all 7 Next.js app frontends: integrate framer-motion animations, responsive shell, command palette, dark mode, and branded empty states across quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, and quantmeet. Each app gets: (1) ResponsiveShell wrapper in layout, (2) ThemeProvider in layout, (3) page transition animations via AnimatedPage, (4) SpringButton replacing Button in key CTAs, (5) CommandPaletteUI wired with Cmd+K, (6) globals.css updated with responsive breakpoints and dark mode variables. Add framer-motion as a dependency to each app's package.json.
steps: Add framer-motion ^11 as a dependency to all 7 Next.js app package.json files (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet)

Update apps/quantmail/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap children in ThemeProvider and add CommandPaletteUI with app-specific commands (compose email, search, go to inbox/sent/drafts). Import from @quant/shared-ui.
Update apps/quantmail/src/app/page.tsx: wrap main content in AnimatedPage for page transitions. Use AnimatedList for email list rendering. Replace key buttons with SpringButton.
Update apps/quantmail/src/app/globals.css: add responsive media queries for 360/414/768/1024/1440px, safe-area-inset padding, and ensure dark mode variables are comprehensive.
Update apps/quantchat/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap in ThemeProvider, add CommandPaletteUI with chat-specific commands (new chat, search conversations, settings).
Update apps/quantchat/src/app/page.tsx: wrap in AnimatedPage, use AnimatedList for conversation list.
Update apps/quantai/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap in ThemeProvider, add CommandPaletteUI with AI commands (new conversation, change model, history).
Update apps/quantcalendar/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap in ThemeProvider, add CommandPaletteUI with calendar commands (new event, today, switch view).
Update apps/quantcalendar/src/app/page.tsx: wrap calendar content in AnimatedPage.
Update apps/quantdocs/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap in ThemeProvider, add CommandPaletteUI with docs commands (new doc, search, templates).
Update apps/quantdrive/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap in ThemeProvider, add CommandPaletteUI with drive commands (upload, new folder, search files).
Update apps/quantmeet/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap in ThemeProvider, add CommandPaletteUI with meet commands (new meeting, join meeting).
Update apps/quantmeet/src/app/page.tsx: wrap main content in AnimatedPage, use SpringButton for 'New Meeting' CTA.
Ensure all 7 apps have consistent globals.css with responsive breakpoints (360/414/768/1024/1440px), dark mode .dark class, safe-area insets, and app-specific accent via --app-color CSS var.
Run pnpm typecheck to verify all apps pass typecheck
Run pnpm build to verify all apps build successfully
acceptance_criteria: All 7 Next.js apps have framer-motion in their dependencies
All 7 apps have ThemeProvider wrapping children in layout.tsx
All 7 apps have CommandPaletteUI with app-specific commands in layout.tsx
All 7 apps page.tsx uses AnimatedPage for page transitions
All 7 apps globals.css has responsive breakpoints and dark mode
pnpm typecheck passes for all apps
pnpm build passes for all apps
findings: All 7 apps updated with framer-motion, ThemeProvider, CommandPaletteUI, AnimatedPage, and comprehensive globals.css. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. pnpm typecheck (111 tasks), pnpm build (88 tasks), and pnpm test (114 tasks) all pass successfully. SpringButton used for primary CTAs in quantmeet (New Meeting) and quantdocs (New Document).
